paths.react: Service layer must stay framework-free — no React imports in lib/services.
paths.next/cache: Service layer must stay framework-free — no next/* imports in lib/services.
paths.next/headers: Service layer must stay framework-free — no next/* imports in lib/services.
paths.next/navigation: Service layer must stay framework-free — no next/* imports in lib/services.
paths.next/server: Service layer must stay framework-free — no next/* imports in lib/services.
paths.@/lib/supabase/server: Service layer must not import the cookie-coupled server client. Receive a Context and use ctx.db.
paths.@/lib/context/server: Service layer must not import the Next-coupled context builder. Receive a Context parameter.
